title: Write a short paragraph
subtitle: Organize four simple sentences.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I live in Auckland, and I study English every day.
我住在奥克兰，每天学习英语。
My goal is to speak more clearly in daily life.
我的目标是在日常生活中说得更清楚。
It is about my life and my English goal.
它关于我的生活和英语目标。

items.en: I live in Auckland, and I study English every day.
items.zh: 我住在奥克兰，每天学习英语。

items.en: My goal is to speak more clearly in daily life.
items.zh: 我的目标是在日常生活中说得更清楚。

items.en: It is about my life and my English goal.
items.zh: 它关于我的生活和英语目标。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It is about my life and my English goal.
lines.zh: 它关于我的生活和英语目标。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: My goal is to speak more clearly in daily life.
lines.zh: 我的目标是在日常生活中说得更清楚。

items.en: I live in Auckland, and I study English every day.
items.zh: 我住在奥克兰，每天学习英语。

items.en: My goal is to speak more clearly in daily life.
items.zh: 我的目标是在日常生活中说得更清楚。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
